mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, file_code, biz_type, file_category, file_name, original_file_name, file_ext, file_format_type, charset, mime_type, file_size_bytes, checksum_type, checksum_value, storage_type, storage_path, storage_bucket, file_version, file_generation_no, is_latest, source_type, source_ref, file_status, biz_date, trace_id, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at

id, tenant_id, template_code, template_name, template_type, biz_type, file_format_type, charset, target_charset, with_bom, line_separator, delimiter, quote_char, escape_char, record_length, header_rows, footer_rows, header_template, trailer_template, checksum_type, compress_type, encrypt_type, naming_rule, field_mappings, validation_rule_set, default_query_code, default_query_sql, query_param_schema, streaming_enabled, page_size, fetch_size, chunk_size, enabled, version, description, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, preprocess_pipeline, preview_masking_enabled, error_line_masking_enabled, log_masking_enabled, content_encryption_enabled, encryption_key_ref, download_requires_approval, masking_rule_set, export_data_ref, load_target_ref, is_deleted
id, tenant_id, channel_code, channel_name, channel_type, target_endpoint, auth_type, config_json, receipt_policy, timeout_seconds, enabled, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
id, pipeline_definition_id, step_code, step_name, stage_code, step_order, impl_code, step_params, timeout_seconds, retry_policy, retry_max_count, enabled, created_at, updated_at

id, tenant_id, file_id, pipeline_instance_id, pipeline_step_run_id, record_no, error_code, error_message, error_stage, is_skipped, skip_action, raw_record, created_at, error_key, error_args, source_row_num, source_column
mapper.select: select from batch.file_record where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and coalesce(storage_bucket, '') = coalesce(#{storageBucket}, '') and storage_path = #{storagePath} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into batch.pipeline_instance ( tenant_id, pipeline_definition_id, job_code, pipeline_type, file_id, related_job_instance_id, current_stage, run_status, trace_id, started_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{pipelineDefinitionId}, #{jobCode}, #{pipelineType}, #{fileId}, #{relatedJobInstanceId}, #{currentStage}, #{runStatus}, #{traceId}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (related_job_instance_id) where related_job_instance_id is not null do update set current_stage = excluded.current_stage, last_success_stage = null, run_status = excluded.run_status, trace_id = excluded.trace_id, started_at = current_timestamp, finished_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update batch.pipeline_instance set file_id = #{fileId}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{pipelineInstanceId}

update batch.pipeline_instance set current_stage = #{currentStage}, last_success_stage = coalesce(#{lastSuccessStage}, last_success_stage), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{pipelineInstanceId}

update batch.pipeline_instance set current_stage = #{currentStage}, last_success_stage = #{lastSuccessStage}, run_status = #{runStatus}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{pipelineInstanceId}

update batch.pipeline_instance set current_stage = #{currentStage}, last_success_stage = #{lastSuccessStage}, run_status = #{runStatus}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{pipelineInstanceId}

update batch.pipeline_step_run set step_status = #{status}, output_summary = #{outputSummaryJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, duration_ms = greatest(0, extract(epoch from (current_timestamp - started_at)) * 1000)::bigint, finished_at = current_timestamp where id = #{stepRunId}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_record ( tenant_id, file_code, biz_type, file_category, file_name, original_file_name, file_ext, file_format_type, charset, mime_type, file_size_bytes, checksum_type, checksum_value, storage_type, storage_path, storage_bucket, file_version, file_generation_no, is_latest, source_type, source_ref, file_status, biz_date, trace_id, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{fileCode}, #{bizType}, #{fileCategory}, #{fileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileExt}, #{fileFormatType}, #{charset}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{checksumType}, #{checksumValue}, #{storageType}, #{storagePath}, #{storageBucket}, #{fileVersion}, #{fileGenerationNo}, true, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRef}, #{fileStatus}, #{bizDate}, #{traceId}, #{metadataJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update batch.file_record set file_status = #{fileStatus}, metadata_json = coalesce(metadata_json, '{}'::jsonb) || coalesce(#{metadataJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{fileId}

update batch.file_record set metadata_json = coalesce(metadata_json, '{}'::jsonb) || coalesce(#{metadataJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.file_error_record ( tenant_id, file_id, pipeline_instance_id, pipeline_step_run_id, record_no, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, error_stage, is_skipped, skip_action, raw_record, source_row_num, source_column, created_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{fileId}, #{pipelineInstanceId}, #{pipelineStepRunId}, #{recordNo}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorStage}, #{isSkipped}, #{skipAction}, #{rawRecordJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{sourceRowNum,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceColumn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_timestamp )

insert into batch.file_audit_log ( tenant_id, file_id, operation_type, operation_result, operator_type, operator_id, trace_id, evidence_ref, detail_summary, created_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{fileId}, #{operationType}, #{operationResult}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{traceId}, #{evidenceRef}, #{detailSummaryJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, current_timestamp )
